changes.newValue:
## Implementation Plan
1. **Audit Domain Models**: Review `frontend\lib\data\models` (Patient, Appointment, TestOrder, Sample, MetaphaseImage, Chromosome) to map out all exact property names and data types.
2. **Update Table Column Labels**: Navigate through all list widgets (e.g., `TodayAppointmentsTable`, `PatientTableHeader`, `LabExaminationTable`, `RecentPatientsTable`) and rename the column headers so they semantically and technically match the model properties.
3. **Update Displayed Information**: Review detailed view screens (e.g., `lab_result_review_page.dart`, `receptionist_patient_detail_view.dart`, `test_results_tab.dart`, `history_tab.dart`) across all roles (Manager, Specialist, Clinician, Receptionist) to replace any placeholder/mock text with dynamic bindings from the models.
4. **Wire Logic (Cubit/Riverpod)**: For screens/widgets currently lacking data-fetching logic (using mock data), inject the appropriate `BlocBuilder` (Cubit) or `Consumer` (Riverpod) following the clean architecture State Management Pattern to pull real data from repositories.
5. **Validation**: Test the screens per role to ensure real-time data flows correctly to the UI without breaking layout or architectural constraints (e.g., no direct Firestore calls in Presentation layer).

changes.oldValue:
## Implementation Plan
1. **Audit Domain Models**: Review `frontend\lib\data\models` (Patient, Appointment, TestOrder, Sample, MetaphaseImage, Chromosome) to map out all exact property names and data types.
2. **Update Table Column Labels**: Navigate through all list widgets (e.g., `TodayAppointmentsTable`, `PatientTableHeader`, `LabExaminationTable`, `RecentPatientsTable`) and rename the column headers so they semantically and technically match the model properties.
3. **Update Displayed Information**: Review detailed view screens (e.g., `lab_result_review_page.dart`, `receptionist_patient_detail_view.dart`, `test_results_tab.dart`, `history_tab.dart`) across all roles (Manager, Specialist, Clinician, Receptionist) to replace any placeholder/mock text with dynamic bindings from the models.
4. **Wire Logic (Cubit/Riverpod)**: For screens/widgets currently lacking data-fetching logic (using mock data), inject the appropriate `BlocBuilder` (Cubit) or `Consumer` (Riverpod) following the clean architecture State Management Pattern to pull real data from repositories.
5. **Validation**: Test the screens per role to ensure real-time data flows correctly to the UI without breaking layout or architectural constraints (e.g., no direct Firestore calls in Presentation layer).
changes.newValue:
## Implementation Plan
1. **SharedMedicalRecordPage**: Inject PatientCubit and call  etchPatientById(widget.id) to load real data. Replace hardcoded 'Johnathan Doe' with state.patient.fullName.
2. **PatientInfoTab**: Refactor to accept Patient entity. Map  ullName, phone, dob, gender, patientCode, and ddress to the UI fields. Remove non-existent fields like 'VIP status'.
3. **TestResultsTab**: Integrate ClinicianOrderCubit. Use BlocBuilder to listen to TestOrdersLoaded. Filter orders by patientId and display real test history in the AppDataTable.
4. **HistoryTab**: Integrate ExaminationCubit. Use BlocBuilder to display real clinical examination records instead of the current 3 mock timeline items.
5. **Validation**: Run  lutter analyze and verify that all screens correctly reflect the domain model attributes defined in lib/domain/entities.
